name: Allmendinger Park
description: Allmendinger Park is a place to play pickleball in Ann Arbor, MI. There is 1 outdoor hard and concrete court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms and water. The court is free.

name: Ann Arbor Golf and Outing Club
description: Come play pickleball at Ann Arbor Golf and Outing Club in Ann Arbor, MI! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Ann Arbor YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Ann Arbor YMCA in Ann Arbor, MI! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Burns Park
description: Come play pickleball at Burns Park in Ann Arbor, MI! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Burns Park
description: Burns Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ypsilanti, MI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Chelsea Senior Center
description: Chelsea Senior Center is a place to play pickleball in Chelsea, MI. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — $25 annual plus $10 club fee annual

name: Dexter United Methodist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Dexter United Methodist Church in Dexter, MI! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Dexter Wellness Center
description: Dexter Wellness Center is a place to play pickleball in Dexter, MI. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, restrooms, trainers or lessons, and water.

name: Ford Lake Park
description: Open inclusive group plays in on the mornings on MWF. All are welcome!
fees: Fee required — $5 daily fee or there are seasonal passes.

name: Hudson Mills Metropark
description: Come play pickleball at Hudson Mills Metropark in Dexter, MI! There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Huron Valley Tennis Club
description: Huron Valley Tennis Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ann Arbor, MI. The court surface is hard. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Leslie Park
description: Leslie Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ann Arbor, MI. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Liberty Athletic Club
description: Private Facility/Club Membership

name: Liberty School
description: Liberty School is a place to play pickleball in Saline, MI. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Meri Lou Murray Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Meri Lou Murray Recreation Center in Ann Arbor, MI! There are 8 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Montibeller Park
description: Come play pickleball at Montibeller Park in Ypsilanti, MI! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are available.

name: Saline Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Saline Recreation Center in Saline, MI! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Scarlett Middle School
description: Come play pickleball at Scarlett Middle School in Ann Arbor, MI! There are 6 wood and hard courts. 3 are indoors and 3 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: South Maple Park
description: South Maple Park is a place to play pickleball in Ann Arbor, MI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: The J - Detroit
description: The J - Detroit is a place to play pickleball in Ann Arbor, MI. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Third Coast Tennis
description: Third Coast Tennis is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ann Arbor, MI. There are 4 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include lights, water, and restrooms.
fees: Fee required — Free membership required to reserve courts.  Court fees are paid when reserving the court.

name: Timbertown Park
description: Open Play available  - mix with others, all skill levels welcome from all areas. Must have paddle and ball.

name: Varsity Pickleball
description: Air-Conditioned facility opened in March 2024. Built by pickleball players for pickleball players.
fees: Fee required — Access to courts via Court Reserve (look for Varsity Pickleball)

name: Wolverine Pickleball
description: Wolverine Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Ann Arbor, MI. There are 12 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and lights.
fees: Fee required — Membership not required to play, but you will be required to create a free CourtReserve account

name: Ypsilanti Township Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Ypsilanti Township Community Center in Ypsilanti, MI! There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is free.

name: Ypsilanti Twp Community Center Park
description: Ypsilanti Twp Community Center Park is a place to play pickleball in Ypsilanti, MI. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
